measurement_note: Size is n, the parentheses-string length. The legal 1024/8192/65536 all-closing tiers span 64x and approach the source limit while requiring an opening insertion before each existing `))` token. The remotely Accepted outstanding-close greedy is O(n), and an independent token-consumption scan also passes. A correct literal list-repair implementation takes one state snapshot and inserts before every pair; it completes every tier and is rejected only by the O(n^2) cost of repeated copying and middle insertion.
